_schema: Stylized spillover-risk weighted points — synthesized from Simkin et al. 2025 (GCB), Lancet PH 2024, Plowright et al. PMC11061335, Choo et al. 2023 (INC3). Each entry is [lat, lon, intensity]. Intensity in [0,1] reflects relative spillover-risk consensus across the 4 papers — not a calibrated model output. Total point count chosen to give a smooth Leaflet.heat surface across the major hotspot regions identified in the literature.
